title: Incorrect hour field length
description:
Hello.
Get strange error
Virtuoso 22007 Error DT011: Cannot convert T23:00:00 to time : Incorrect hour field length
for request:
INSERT DATA {
  <http://data.something.fr/resource/ontology/test#PAT12> <http://data.something.fr/resource/ontology/test#userHasClosingWorkingHour> "23:00:00"^^<http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#time> .
  <http://data.something.fr/resource/ontology/test#PAT12> <http://data.something.fr/resource/ontology/test#userHasOpeningWorkingHour> "08:00:00"^^<http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#time> .
}

but all OK for 23:00.00  how is that?
Everywhere XML time is with : delimiter
Virtuoso:
Version: 07.20.3230
Build: Feb 4 2020
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_hours (id INT PRIMARY KEY, closing_hour TIME, opening_hour TIME);
INSERT INTO test_hours (id, closing_hour, opening_hour) VALUES (1, '23:00:00', '08:00:00');
INSERT INTO test_hours (id, closing_hour, opening_hour) VALUES (2, NULL, '09:00:00');
SELECT id, closing_hour, opening_hour FROM test_hours WHERE closing_hour IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE test_hours SET closing_hour = '23:00:00' WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: Incorrect hour field length in time format
